title: languages
description: GitHub's /languages endpoint returns a single JSON object keyed by language name with byte-count values (e.g. {"Go": 123456, "Shell": 890}), an arbitrary/dynamic key set (not a fixed set of named properties) — this stream declares projection:passthrough so every language key is preserved verbatim rather than dropped by schema-mode's fixed-property projection (records.keyed_object does not apply here since the values are bare integers, not objects). One record per repository.

repository.description: Config-derived per-record marker field ("owner/repo"); the only statically-declared property. All other emitted fields are the dynamic per-language byte counts, passed through verbatim.
